visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a blue patterned cap sits at a wooden table in a brightly lit indoor studio. He wears a light green T-shirt and gestures with a silver smartphone, speaking directly to the camera with an animated expression. A yellow smartwatch is visible on his left wrist. (2) The man holds up a white and black product package for a phone case, rotating it to show the front and back graphics to the viewer. He points at the brand name on the packaging with his right hand while maintaining eye contact with the camera. (3) He demonstrates two pieces of translucent protective film, holding them up against a silver phone and then against the back of a clear phone case. He uses one finger to point out specific areas where the film should be applied to avoid scratches. (4) The camera shows a close-up of three iPhones in different colors (silver, orange, and blue) arranged on the wooden table. The man picks up the blue device, showing the smooth texture of the applied back protector under the studio lights.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: @3ctim. [Logo]: 3c 意思是 Tim 哥. [Subtitle]: 網路上. (2) [Subtitle]: 最近在 iPhone 17 Pro. (3) [Subtitle]: 開賣的時候. (4) [Subtitle]: 我發現有人. (5) [Subtitle]: 不小心把背後玻璃. (6) [Subtitle]: 刮花了. (7) [Subtitle]: 那該怎麼辦. (8) [Subtitle]: 嘿 imos 他賣的. (9) [Subtitle]: 一般款或磁吸款的. (10) [Subtitle]: 竟然有貼心贈送了. (11) [Subtitle]: 兩張背貼. (12) [Subtitle]: 一張當然就貼在. (13) [Subtitle]: 手機背後玻璃. (14) [Subtitle]: 另外一張呢. (15) [Subtitle]: 可以貼在你的手機殼的背後. (16) [Subtitle]: 因為有些人也怕你手機殼會刮傷喔. (17) [Subtitle]: 雙重保護. (18) [Subtitle]: 你看我剛把它貼好了. (19) [Subtitle]: 銀色的橘色的. (20) [Subtitle]: 這邊還有. (21) [Subtitle]: 藍色的. (22) [Subtitle]: 是不是更. (23) [Subtitle]: 安心一點啊

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the products.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a light green 'ATHLETICS' t-shirt, a blue patterned flat cap, black-rimmed glasses, and a wooden beaded bracelet. He wears a yellow-strapped smartwatch.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, off-white wall in a studio setting with a dark wooden table in the foreground. Phone boxes are visible on the table in the latter half of the video.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male speaker begins with high vocal arousal and energetic pitch variability in Traditional Chinese. An upbeat, major-mode acoustic guitar BGM starts simultaneously, maintaining a consistent tempo. A soft percussive thud is heard as an object is placed on a table. (2) A sharp plastic rustling sound triggers as a package is handled. The speaker's voice maintains professional clarity with rising intonation patterns. A digital bubble-pop SFX highlights the appearance of a brand name in the visual narrative. (3) The acoustic texture shifts slightly as the speaker introduces specific features. A subtle 'ding' sound effect, similar to a notification chime, marks a key piece of information. The BGM remains in a light, rhythmic loop underneath the narration. (4) Multiple soft impact sounds occur as phones are touched and displayed. The speaker's voice reaches a high dominance level in the concluding sentences. The audio track ends with a clean fade-out of both the speech and the background music.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Problem Identification -> Product Solution -> Technical Demo -> Outcome Validation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional showcase for 'imos' protective films and cases. The creator highlights the vulnerability of the iPhone 17 Pro's back glass to scratches and presents imos products as the ideal solution. By demonstrating that the package includes two films for 'double protection' of both the phone and the case, the content aims to convince viewers of the product's value and practicality.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator prominently features the brand 'imos', demonstrates its specific protective benefits, and holds the original packaging to the camera.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Professional tech influencer content characterized by high-density speech, upbeat BGM, and clear visual demonstrations of product features.
